common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.notFoundHint: Check the link or ask the host for a fresh one.

landing.heroSub: Guests scan a QR code and shoot right in the browser — no app, no sign-up. Every shot stays hidden until the reveal, then the whole night opens in one shared gallery.
landing.howTitle: How a night becomes a film
landing.step1Text: Name, date, film style — your QR code and link are ready in a minute. Print the table cards.
landing.step2Text: Everyone gets their own roll with a limited number of shots. The camera opens in the browser, and nothing is visible until the reveal.
landing.step3Text: At the hour you choose, the film develops: every shot opens in one shared gallery. The whole night, through everyone's eyes.
landing.stylesTitle: See the style before the shot
landing.stylesSub: The chosen film applies to the live viewfinder instantly. The original is always stored clean.
landing.revealTitle: A secret by night. A film by morning.
landing.revealSub: Nobody sees a single frame before the reveal. The wait is part of the gift — and the morning after becomes special again.
landing.trust1Text: Filters never destroy a shot: the clean full-resolution original is always there to download.
landing.trust2Text: The server won't hand out a single frame early — not even to the most impatient guests.
landing.trust3Text: No watermarks, no paywalled unlocks. Download the entire gallery as one archive.
landing.trust4Text: A QR code or a link — the camera opens in the browser within seconds, even on older Android phones.
landing.pricingTitle: Pay per event, not per month
landing.pricingNote: Paid via Kaspi. One event — one payment.
landing.faq1q: Do guests need to install an app?
landing.faq1a: No. The camera opens right in the browser from a link or QR code. Works on iPhone and Android, including budget models.
landing.faq2a: Whenever you decide: instantly, at the end of the night, or at your own time — say, 10:00 the next morning. Until then only you can see them.
landing.faq3q: A guest shot with a filter — can I get the original?
landing.faq3a: The original is always stored clean at full resolution. A style is just glass over the frame; downloads give you the source file.
landing.faq4a: Small events are free. Bigger ones are a fixed one-time payment per event — no subscriptions, no hidden fees.
landing.faq5a: In private storage: accessible only through your event link and only after the reveal. Download the archive and they're yours forever.
landing.ctaSub: Setup takes a minute. Small events are free.

auth.title: Sign in to Kadr
auth.subtitle: The host dashboard: events, QR codes and galleries.
auth.linkSentHint: Open the email at {email} and follow the link on this device.
auth.noPassword: No passwords: a link to your email, or Google sign-in.

dashboard.title: Your events
dashboard.emptyText: Create your first event — the QR code and the guest camera will be ready in a minute.

create.title: New event
create.subtitle: A minute of setup — and the film is ready for your guests.
create.endAfterStart: End time must be after the start
create.shotsHint: The fewer the shots, the more each one matters.
create.guestsHint: Up to {count} guests — free. Leave empty for unlimited.
create.revealInstantHint: Shots appear in the gallery right after capture
create.revealEventEndHint: The film develops when the event ends
create.styleHint: The starting style of the guest camera. Originals are always stored clean.

event.draftText: Activate the event to open the camera to guests. One payment — the link and QR appear right after it.
event.shareHint: Print QR cards for the tables or drop the link into the guest chat — they need no app and no account.
event.revealNowConfirm: Open the gallery to everyone right now?
event.hostOnlyNote: visible only to you until the reveal
event.noPhotosYet: No shots yet. As soon as guests start shooting, everything lands here.

guest.nameHint: Your name appears under your shots in the shared gallery
guest.noAppNeeded: No app, no sign-up. Your shots develop in the shared gallery.

camera.outOfFilmText: All {shots} shots are taken. Great work — now we wait for the reveal.
camera.permissionText: Allow camera access in your browser settings — or shoot with your phone's native camera.

gallery.lockedText: The photos open {time}. Nobody sees them earlier — not even us.

mockPay.sandboxNote: This is the payment provider's sandbox: no real money moves. In production this is the Kaspi Pay screen.
